ValidationRule.description: If the case is moved to QMS, the F1 Complaint Number is mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE ,RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - Complaint' ,ISBLANK(F1_Complaint_Number__c ) ,OR(ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Sent to QMS') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_024: An F1 Complaint Number is required for a Case to be set to the status of Sent to QMS
